report_header.report_type: Settlement Failure Prevention System - Daily Risk Assessment
report_header.regulatory_framework: Financial Sector Conduct Authority (FSCA) Market Conduct Provisions

risk_factors.primary: CIS_UNAVAILABLE - Integration timeout preventing risk assessment
risk_factors.combined_impact: Unable to verify counterparty settlement capacity for significant exposure

TRD-2007.agent_decision_rationale: Automatic CRITICAL classification applied due to dual risk factors: (1) CIS system unavailability prevents verification of counterparty financial position and settlement capacity, and (2) exposure amount exceeds large exposure threshold. This combination creates unacceptable settlement risk requiring immediate manual intervention.
TRD-2007.regulatory_implications: Potential breach of JSE Settlement Rules if counterparty fails to deliver securities without prior risk mitigation
TRD-2007.recommended_actions: Manual verification of counterparty settlement capacity, consideration of trade suspension or enhanced collateral requirements

lolr_actions.regulatory_basis: SARB Guidelines on Market Making Support

manual_escalations.escalation_reason: CIS system unavailable - automated risk assessment impossible

data_quality_attestation.data_validation_results: All available data passed validation checks. Missing data flagged for manual review.

compliance_statements.fsca_market_conduct: Risk assessment conducted in accordance with FSCA Market Conduct Provisions. All identified risks documented and escalated appropriately.
compliance_statements.jse_settlement_rules: Settlement risk monitoring performed in compliance with JSE Settlement Rules. Critical risk items flagged for immediate attention.
compliance_statements.sarb_guidelines: No LOLR actions required this cycle. SARB Guidelines framework maintained for future interventions.
compliance_statements.audit_trail: Complete audit trail maintained for all system decisions and actions. All entries immutably logged with timestamps and decision rationale.

immediate: Manual verification of TerraFin Brokers Ltd settlement capacity
Consider trade suspension or enhanced monitoring for TRD-2007
Investigate CIS integration failure for CP-007
within_24_hours: Restore CIS connectivity for TerraFin Brokers Ltd
Review and update counterparty risk thresholds if necessary
Validate settlement positions for all T+1 trades
ongoing: Enhanced surveillance for CP-003 (Summit Asset Managers) due to degraded data quality
Continue automated risk monitoring for remaining portfolio

report_certification.certification_statement: This report accurately reflects the settlement risk assessment performed by the JSE Settlement Failure Prevention System for the specified time period. All risk classifications and recommendations are based on available data and established regulatory requirements.
